signature_wines.name: Scharzhofberger Riesling Auslese
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Botrytis-laced Scharzhofberg Auslese of extraordinary concentration and near-immortal cellar life. Wine Advocate 97 points (2018 vintage, reviewed 2020). Source: egon-mueller.de.
signature_wines.description: Botrytis-laced Scharzhofberg Auslese of extraordinary concentration and near-immortal cellar life, among the world's great sweet wines.

signature_wines.name: Scharzhofberger Riesling Trockenbeerenauslese
signature_wines.tasting_notes: An intensely botrytised Scharzhofberg TBA of liqueur-like concentration, regularly the most expensive young white wine in the world. Source: egon-mueller.de.
signature_wines.description: An intensely botrytised Scharzhofberg Trockenbeerenauslese of liqueur-like concentration, one of the rarest and most expensive white wines made.

signature_wines.name: Wehlener Sonnenuhr Riesling Spatlese
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The archetypal J.J. Prum fruity-style Spatlese from the Wehlener Sonnenuhr, famously reductive young and ageing for decades into honeyed complexity. Wine Advocate 94 points (2019, reviewed 2021). Source: vdp.de.
signature_wines.description: A profound fruity-style Spatlese from the Wehlener Sonnenuhr that ages for decades into honeyed complexity.

signature_wines.name: Brauneberger Juffer-Sonnenuhr Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Mosel Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the steep Brauneberger Juffer-Sonnenuhr, crystalline and intensely mineral. Wine Advocate 93 points (2020, reviewed 2022). Source: weingut-fritz-haag.de.
signature_wines.description: The flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the steep Brauneberger Juffer-Sonnenuhr, crystalline and intensely mineral.

signature_wines.name: Saarburger Rausch Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Saar Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the Saarburger Rausch, with dried pear, candied lemon and orange blossom over smoky reduction and razor-sharp precision. Source: zilliken-vdp.de.
signature_wines.description: The flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the Saarburger Rausch, taut and deeply mineral with great racy length.

signature_wines.name: Abtsberg Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.style: still dry Ruwer Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the Abtsberg monopole, finely structured with refined terroir aroma and delicate fruit. Wine Advocate 94 points (2020, reviewed 2022). Source: maximingruenhaus.de.
signature_wines.description: The flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the Abtsberg monopole, finely structured with refined terroir aroma.

signature_wines.name: Marienburg Falkenlay Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry biodynamic Mosel Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A dry Grosses Gewachs from the blue-slate Falkenlay parcel of the Marienburg, deep, spicy and densely mineral, farmed biodynamically. Wine Advocate 93 points (2020, reviewed 2022). Source: clemens-busch.de.
signature_wines.description: A dry Grosses Gewachs from the blue-slate Falkenlay parcel of the Marienburg, deep, spicy and densely mineral.

signature_wines.name: Scharzhofberger Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Saar Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A concentrated dry Grosses Gewachs from the Scharzhofberg, with dark spice, ripe citrus and firm slaty minerality. Wine Advocate 93 points (2017, reviewed 2018). Source: vanvolxem.com.
signature_wines.description: A concentrated dry Grosses Gewachs from the Scharzhofberg with dark spice, ripe citrus and firm slaty minerality.

signature_wines.name: Uhlen Laubach Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Terrassenmosel Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A dry Grosses Gewachs from the Laubach terraces of the Winninger Uhlen, with peach and citrus over cool, taut minerality. Wine Advocate 94 points (2018, reviewed 2020). Source: hl.wine.
signature_wines.description: A dry Grosses Gewachs from the Laubach terraces of the Winninger Uhlen, with peach and citrus over cool, taut minerality.

signature_wines.name: Lieserer Niederberg Helden Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Mosel Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Thomas Haag's home-vineyard dry Grosses Gewachs from the Lieserer Niederberg Helden, precise, taut and minerally. Source: weingut-schloss-lieser.de.
signature_wines.description: Thomas Haag's home-vineyard dry Grosses Gewachs from the Lieserer Niederberg Helden, precise, taut and minerally.

signature_wines.name: Erdener Treppchen Riesling GG Alte Reben
signature_wines.style: still dry Mosel Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Dry Grosses Gewachs from ungrafted old vines on the red slate of the Erdener Treppchen, with peach, apricot and salty slate minerality. Wine Advocate 93 points (2019, reviewed 2021). Source: drloosen.de.
signature_wines.description: Dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from ungrafted old vines on the red slate of the Erdener Treppchen, made by Ernst Loosen.

signature_wines.name: Pinot Noix Spatburgunder
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A cult Mosel Pinot Noir grown on Devonian slate in a low-yield Burgundian style, bright red-fruited with fine tannins. Falstaff 93 points (2019, reviewed 2022). Source: pinot-noix.com.
signature_wines.description: A cult Mosel Pinot Noir grown on Devonian slate in a low-yield Burgundian style, bright red-fruited with fine tannins.
